Product Features

  • Whether you need a organizer for pantry or a snack organizer, this cabinet has you covered.this cabinet fits seamlessly into tight spaces, from small kitchens to busy office break rooms.
  • 3 Tier Floor Standing cabinet ,Slide Out Storage snack cabinet, Bedroom Living Room Hidden Storage Cabinet with Wheels This cabinet provides multiple storage options, Countertop Storage, and 3 Levels of Dividers.
  • Not Just for Kitchens: Use it in your pantry, bathroom, laundry room, or office—this is home organizer that works wherever clutter creeps in.
  • Material:Material is 15mm particle bpard,back board is 3mm MDF. Made of wooden structure with melamine finish for durability and easy maintenance. Aufgrund des Lichts oder der Anzeige kann die Farbe des tatsächlichen Produkts geringfügig vom Bild abweichen.
